mentions.note: Earnings missed badly; Cramer's trust lost heavily; compared to a weekend of hell in 1982; semiconductor oversupply headwind.
Infrastructure semiconductor enabling data center buildout; beneficiary of Computex-validated infrastructure thesis.
Investing Club position reporting Wednesday after close; hit all-time high today—circumspect on profit-taking risk despite solid expected quarter. Data-center driven but valuation elevated.

Sleeper play; makes custom chips for Google, Meta, ByteDance, Anthropic; VMware enterprise software gateway to cloud; CEO Hock Tan shrewd, constantly landing new clients; charitable trust held thick-and-thin with big gains.
Key semiconductor infrastructure player powering data center and AI compute; benefiting from hardware-centric market shift.
Third largest weighting in CIBR cybersecurity ETF; primarily semiconductor/networking; Cramer owns for charitable trust forever; quality company.
Dominant networking and custom chips; major Meta, Anthropic, Google customer; trimmed position today for portfolio flexibility.
Marvell won custom accelerator chip bid from Broadcom; Cramer stuck with Broadcom for travel trust; today got TWO deals (Google, Anthropic); stock up 6%+; right call vs. chasing Marvell.
Core holding for long-time investor (Chris) from pandemic low; strong performer; maintain position.
Stellar earnings today; gigantic semiconductor company with software division that had been hammered until today's bounce; ready to soar with semis if export rumor cleared.
$1.5T company makes semis and software; caught in AI-driven software decline fears; sells to Alphabet; too hard to own right now despite size.
Multi-year semiconductor winner crushed alongside Nvidia, AMD on program trade. No fundamental deterioration; buyable on dislocation.
Semiconductor beneficiary of AI infrastructure buildout; not a good time to enter after bounce, but great company; expect Hock Tan buyback; wait for pullback.
Infrastructure supplier to OpenAI and hyperscalers; benefits from data center buildout but subject to OpenAI fundraising/market share risk.
Semiconductor equipment maker; makes chips for Google; diversified tech play.
Linked to AI infrastructure spending; rallied $3 today, possibly starting upward move; wait for more confirmation alongside Nvidia/AI validation.
Off highs like Nvidia; consistently recommended, no fresh catalyst.
